allow:
Bash(curl -s --max-time 5 -X POST http://127.0.0.1:29979/mcp \\
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\
  -H "Accept: application/json, text/event-stream" \\
  -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{},"clientInfo":{"name":"test","version":"1.0"}}}' 2>&1)

Bash(SESSION_ID="d19ef8a8-2a99-421c-b1f0-6c431d39b8a0"

curl -s --max-time 10 -X POST http://127.0.0.1:29979/mcp \\
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\
  -H "Accept: application/json, text/event-stream" \\
  -H "mcp-session-id: $SESSION_ID" \\
  -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":3,"method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_basic_info","arguments":{}}}' 2>&1 | \\
  python3 -c "
import sys, json
raw = sys.stdin.read\(\)
for line in raw.split\('\\n'\):
    if line.startswith\('data: '\):
        try:
            obj = json.loads\(line[6:]\)
            result = obj.get\('result',{}\)
            content = result.get\('content',[]\)
            for c in content:
                print\(c.get\('text',''\)\)
        except: pass
")

Bash(SESSION_ID="d19ef8a8-2a99-421c-b1f0-6c431d39b8a0"

curl -s --max-time 15 -X POST http://127.0.0.1:29979/mcp \\
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\
  -H "Accept: application/json, text/event-stream" \\
  -H "mcp-session-id: $SESSION_ID" \\
  -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":4,"method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_font_family_info","arguments":{"familyNames":["IBM Plex Sans","IBM Plex Serif"]}}}' 2>&1 | \\
  python3 -c "
import sys, json
raw = sys.stdin.read\(\)
for line in raw.split\('\\n'\):
    if line.startswith\('data: '\):
        try:
            obj = json.loads\(line[6:]\)
            content = obj.get\('result',{}\).get\('content',[]\)
            for c in content: print\(c.get\('text',''\)\)
        except: pass
")
